title: TranslatableDebugOptions
description: Make the Debug Option screen translatable.
body:
Just a simple mod that makes the Debug Option screen translatable. It should be compatible with any version after 25w31a. I created the original en_us.json. Pull Requests for other languages are welcome.

The translation key format is:
```
debug.<namespace>.<path>
```
Examples:
```
debug.minecraft.biome
debug.sodium.debug
```
![Example image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea269d13bd0a72056b447741acac8ebce606ea33_0.webp)
